Usage: kes-agent-control [-c|--control-address ADDR] [-v|--verbose ARG] 
                         [--retry-delay|--retry-interval ARG] 
                         [--retry-exponential] [--retry-attempts ARG] COMMAND

Available options:
  -c,--control-address ADDR
                           Socket address for 'control' connections to a running
                           kes-agent process. ($KES_AGENT_CONTROL_PATH)
  -v,--verbose ARG         Set verbosity
  --retry-delay,--retry-interval ARG
                           Connection retry interval (milliseconds).
                           ($KES_AGENT_CONTROL_RETRY_INTERVAL)
  --retry-exponential      Exponentially increase retry interval
  --retry-attempts ARG     Number of connection retry attempts.
                           ($KES_AGENT_CONTROL_RETRY_ATTEMPTS)
  --version                Show version information
  -h,--help                Show this help text

Available commands:
  gen-staged-key           
  drop-staged-key          
  export-staged-vkey       
  install-key              
  drop-key                 
  info
